class="framer-text framer-text-module" style="width:100%;height:auto" data-width="fill"><div style="width:100%;padding-bottom:75%;position:relative"><iframe loading="lazy" src="https://examples.motion.dev/react/number-radix-slider?utm_source=embed" style="width:100%;height:100%;border:0;position:absolute;top:0;left:0" allow="accelerometer; ambient-light-sensor; camera; encrypted-media; geolocation; gyroscope; hid; microphone; midi; payment; usb; vr; xr-spatial-tracking; clipboard-write;" sandbox="allow-forms allow-modals allow-popups allow-presentation allow-same-origin allow-scripts allow-top-navigation allow-top-navigation-by-user-activation"></iframe></div></div><h2 dir="auto" class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-exngks" id="next" style="scroll-margin-top:150px"><a href="#next" class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1p15ko0">Next</a></h2><p dir="auto" class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-8ohns9">In this guide we've covered the basic kinds of animations we can perform in Motion using its <strong class="framer-text">animation props</strong>. However, there's much more to discover.</p><p dir="auto" class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-8ohns9">Most of the examples on this page have used HTML elements, but Motion also has unique <!--$--><a class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1kclasy" href="./react-svg-animation">SVG animation</a><!--/$--> features, like its simple line drawing API.</p><p dir="auto" class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-8ohns9">We've also only covered time-based animations, but Motion also provides powerful <!--$--><a class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1kclasy" href="./react-scroll-animations">scroll animation</a><!--/$--> features like <code class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1x44pam">useScroll</code> and <code class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1x44pam">whileInView</code>.</p><p dir="auto" class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-8ohns9">It also provides a powerful <!--$--><a class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1kclasy" href="./react-layout-animations">layout animation</a><!--/$--> engine, that can animate between any two layouts using performant transforms.</p><p dir="auto" class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-8ohns9">Finally, there's also a whole <!--$--><a class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-1kclasy" href="https://motion.dev/examples?platform=react#fundamentals" rel="noopener">Fundamentals examples category</a><!--/$--> that covers all the basics of animating with Motion for React with live demos and copy-paste code.</p></div></div></article><section Unlike Layout Animations you may have seen in React Native or Motion, this means that not every individual Element inside of it animates its position. This can lead to better performance and a more continuous feeling, smooth animation compared to animating every individual piece.\"]]],[4,\"p\",{\"dir\":\"auto\"},[5,\"Neither of these claims are true.\"]],[4,\"p\",{\"dir\":\"auto\"},[5,\"From our own stress test benchmarking, creating image bitmaps and constructing a pseudo-DOM is more memory intensive and slower than the equivalent layout measurements used by Motion's \"],[2,{\"href\":{\"webPageId\":\"MtVxH2FBo\",\"pathVariables\":{\"sg3kghrCF\":\"layout-animations\"},\"unresolvedPathSlugs\":{\"sg3kghrCF\":{\"collectionItemId\":\"aOgXxq81H\",\"collectionId\":\"AaN8oZOpy\"}}},\"openInNewTab\":false,\"smoothScroll\":false,\"relValues\":[],\"motionChild\":true,\"nodeId\":\"AaN8oZOpy\",\"scopeId\":\"contentManagement\"},[4,\"a\",null,[5,\"layout animations\"]]],[5,\".\"]],[4,\"p\",{\"dir\":\"auto\"},[5,\"The claim of \\\"a more continuous feeling\\\" is also not right. Layout animations are **\"],[4,\"strong\",null,[5,\"interruptible\"]],[5,\"**, which means you can change direction mid-animation and they respond immediately. View transitions are **\"],[4,\"strong\",null,[5,\"not interruptible\"]],[5,\"**, meaning they must complete before a new transition can begin. This makes layout animations a far better candidate for micro-interactions where responsiveness matters.\"]],[4,\"p\",{\"dir\":\"auto\"},[5,\"View transitions are best suited for **\"],[4,\"strong\",null,[5,\"page-level transitions\"]],[5,\"** (route changes, full-view swaps) where the non-interruptible nature is acceptable and the snapshot-based approach avoids complex per-element coordination.\"]],[4,\"h2\",{\"dir\":\"auto\"},[5,\"Props\"]],[4,\"h3\",{\"dir\":\"auto\"},[4,\"code\",null,[5,\"transition\"]]],[4,\"p\",{\"dir\":\"auto\"},[5,\"Default transition for all animation types. Accepts any Motion transition, including springs.\"]],[4,\"div\",{\"className\":\"framer-text-module\",\"style\":{\"width\":\"100%\",\"height\":\"auto\"},\"data-width\":\"fill\"},[3,\"module:pVk4QsoHxASnVtUBp6jr/ttReBBOK4JjO79S16uu9/CodeBlock.js:default\",{\"code\":\"\u003CAnimateView transition={{ type: spring, visualDuration: 0.4, bounce: 0.3 }}>\",\"language\":\"JSX\"},[],[]]],[4,\"h3\",{\"dir\":\"auto\"},[4,\"code\",null,[5,\"enter\"]]],[4,\"p\",{\"dir\":\"auto\"},[4,\"strong\",null,[5,\"Default: \"]],[4,\"code\",null,[5,\"{ opacity: 1 Motion+ is a one-time payment, lifetime membership that unlocks exclusive components, premium examples and access to a private Discord community.\"]],[4,\"div\",{\"className\":\"framer-text-module\",\"style\":{\"width\":\"100%\",\"height\":\"auto\"},\"data-width\":\"fill\"},[3,\"module:05B5K0pCl9oc4uJEto2N/BJPpejUDWWaYUUJXIIag/Example.js:default\",{\"platform\":\"react\",\"id\":\"ios-pointer\"},[],[]]],[4,\"h2\",{\"dir\":\"auto\"},[5,\"Features\"]],[4,\"ul\",null,[4,\"li\",{\"data-preset-tag\":\"p\"},[4,\"p\",{\"dir\":\"auto\"},[4,\"strong\",null,[5,\"Two modes: \"]],[5,\"Easily switch between replacing the default cursor or creating a \\\"follow\\\" cursor effect.\"]]],[4,\"li\",{\"data-preset-tag\":\"p\"},[4,\"p\",{\"dir\":\"auto\"},[4,\"strong\",null,[5,\"State-aware:\"]],[5,\" Automatically adapts its appearance when hovering over links, buttons, or selectable text, and when pressed.\"]]],[4,\"li\",{\"data-preset-tag\":\"p\"},[4,\"p\",{\"dir\":\"auto\"},[4,\"strong\",null,[5,\"Magnetic:\"]],[5,\" Make the cursor snap to interactive elements on hover for a tactile feel.\"]]],[4,\"li\",{\"data-preset-tag\":\"p\"},[4,\"p\",{\"dir\":\"auto\"},[4,\"strong\",null,[5,\"Customisable: \"]],[5,\"Use CSS, Motion variants, and custom React components to create any cursor you can imagine.\"]]],[4,\"li\",{\"data-preset-tag\":\"p\"},[4,\"p\",{\"dir\":\"auto\"},[4,\"strong\",null,[5,\"Accessible:\"]],[5,\" Can be disabled for users who prefer reduced motion.\"]]]],[4,\"h2\",{\"dir\":\"auto\"},[5,\"Install\"]],[4,\"p\",{\"dir\":\"auto\"},[5,\"First, add the \"],[4,\"code\",null,[5,\"motion-plus\"]],[5,\" package to your project using your \"],[2,{\"href\":\"https://plus.motion.dev\",\"openInNewTab\":true,\"smoothScroll\":false,\"relValues\":[],\"motionChild\":true,\"nodeId\":\"AaN8oZOpy\",\"scopeId\":\"contentManagement\"},[4,\"a\",null,[5,\"private token\"]]],[5,\". You need to be a \"],[2,{\"href\":{\"webPageId\":\"j8mz8aBG5\"},\"openInNewTab\":false,\"smoothScroll\":false,\"relValues\":[],\"motionChild\":true,\"nodeId\":\"AaN8oZOpy\",\"scopeId\":\"contentManagement\"},[4,\"a\",null,[5,\"Motion+ member\"]]],[5,\" to generate a private token.\"]],[4,\"div\",{\"className\":\"framer-text-module\",\"style\":{\"width\":\"100%\",\"height\":\"auto\"},\"data-width\":\"fill\"},[3,\"module:pVk4QsoHxASnVtUBp6jr/ttReBBOK4JjO79S16uu9/CodeBlock.js:default\",{\"code\":\"npm install \\\"https://api.motion.dev/registry.tgz?package=motion-plus&version=2.0.2&token=YOUR_AUTH_TOKEN\\\"\",\"language\":\"Shell\"},[],[]]],[4,\"h2\",{\"dir\":\"auto\"},[5,\"Usage\"]],[4,\"p\",{\"dir\":\"auto\"},[5,\"The \"],[4,\"code\",null,[5,\"Cursor\"]],[5,\" component is used for both custom cursor and follow cursor effects:\"]],[4,\"div\",{\"className\":\"framer-text-module\",\"style\":{\"width\":\"100%\",\"height\":\"auto\"},\"data-width\":\"fill\"},[3,\"module:pVk4QsoHxASnVtUBp6jr/ttReBBOK4JjO79S16uu9/CodeBlock.js:default\",{\"code\":\"import { Cursor } from \\\"motion-plus/react\\\"\",\"language\":\"JSX\"},[],[]]],[4,\"p\",{\"dir\":\"auto\"},[5,\"When \"],[4,\"code\",null,[5,\"Cursor\"]],[5,\" is rendered, a default custom cursor will render on the page, hiding the browser's default cursor.\"]],[4,\"div\",{\"className\":\"framer-text-module\",\"style\":{\"width\":\"100%\",\"height\":\"auto\"},\"data-width\":\"fill\"},[3,\"module:pVk4QsoHxASnVtUBp6jr/ttReBBOK4JjO79S16uu9/CodeBlock.js:default\",{\"code\":\"\u003CCursor />\",\"language\":\"JSX\"},[],[]]],[4,\"p\",{\"dir\":\"auto\"},[5,\"You can remove the cursor and restore the browser cursor at any time by removing the component.\"]],[4,\"div\",{\"className\":\"framer-text-module\",\"style\":{\"width\":\"100%\",\"height\":\"auto\"},\"data-width\":\"fill\"},[3,\"module:pVk4QsoHxASnVtUBp6jr/ttReBBOK4JjO79S16uu9/CodeBlock.js:default\",{\"code\":\"{isCursorVisible ? \u003CCursor /> : null}\",\"language\":\"JSX\"},[],[]]],[4,\"div\",{\"className\":\"framer-text-module\",\"style\":{\"width\":\"100%\",\"height\":\"auto\"},\"data-width\":\"fill\"},[3,\"module:05B5K0pCl9oc4uJEto2N/BJPpejUDWWaYUUJXIIag/Example.js:default\",{\"platform\":\"react\",\"id\":\"cursor\"},[],[]]],[4,\"h3\",{\"dir\":\"auto\"},[5,\"Styling\"]],[4,\"p\",{\"dir\":\"auto\"},[5,\"By default, the cursor is a neutral grey color. It's possible to change the cursor's styles using CSS.\"]],[4,\"div\",{\"className\":\"framer-text-module\",\"style\":{\"width\":\"100%\",\"height\":\"auto\"},\"data-width\":\"fill\"},[3,\"module:pVk4QsoHxASnVtUBp6jr/ttReBBOK4JjO79S16uu9/CodeBlock.js:default\",{\"code\":\"\u003CCursor className=\\\"my-cursor\\\" style={{ backgroundColor: \\\"red\\\" }} />\",\"language\":\"JSX\"},[],[]]],[4,\"h4\",{\"dir\":\"auto\"},[4,\"br\",{\"className\":\"trailing-break\"}]]]",["Map",499,500,501,22,502,90,503,111,504,159,505,506,507,508,509,84,510,511,512,513,514,120,515,286,516,130,517,103,518,218,519,179,520,353,521,522],"getSlugByRecordId|AaN8oZOpy|default|tzinTLldn","ai-kit","getSlugByRecordId|AaN8oZOpy|default|wIaOsSv9W","getSlugByRecordId|AaN8oZOpy|default|mvoYsRMpO","getSlugByRecordId|AaN8oZOpy|default|UzLTCWnfz","getSlugByRecordId|AaN8oZOpy|default|AN1zdEDXH","getSlugByRecordId|AaN8oZOpy|default|HbQaFU10F","gsap-vs-motion","getSlugByRecordId|AaN8oZOpy|default|zNKZJiC31","quick-start","getSlugByRecordId|AaN8oZOpy|default|SRWZjVoPE","getSlugByRecordId|AaN8oZOpy|default|JNGOumAVG","vue","getSlugByRecordId|AaN8oZOpy|default|yPJelKU6m","studio","getSlugByRecordId|AaN8oZOpy|default|e8RPaSVBD","getSlugByRecordId|AaN8oZOpy|default|awBVFEUqH","getSlugByRecordId|AaN8oZOpy|default|KmPr24ky4","getSlugByRecordId|AaN8oZOpy|default|gvXiUBfZJ","getSlugByRecordId|AaN8oZOpy|default|AVAjAoi0Q","getSlugByRecordId|AaN8oZOpy|default|b7kGL54Fc","getSlugByRecordId|AaN8oZOpy|default|hImk7Ci3d","getSlugByRecordId|znUvj_Bqk|default|XTG4AxHYZ","web-animation-performance-tier-list"]</script><div id="svg-templates" style="position: absolute; overflow: hidden; bottom: 0; left: 0; width: 0; height: 0; z-index: 0; contain: strict" aria-hidden="true">

<script type="text/javascript">
  const isDev = window.location.host !== "motion.dev"

  Paddle.Initialize({ 
    token: isDev ? "test_f13ee42b11c40741091a279744c" : "live_e629c1567996e680925324dfb66",

    Paddle.Environment.set('sandbox')

</script>
<script async>
document.addEventListener('keydown', function(event) {
    if (event.metaKey && event.key === 'k') {
        event.preventDefault();
        const searchButton = document.querySelector('[data-framer-name="Search Container"] button')
        if (searchButton) searchButton.click()
    }
});
</script>
